summary: Cross-chain mapping for the Ronin Bridge benchmark. Ethereum holds the custodial WETH/USDC balance; Ronin chain holds the wrapped representations. The attack drained the Ethereum-side custody — Ronin-side balances were unaffected, but the wrapped tokens on Ronin were left unbacked.

contracts.note: Ronin chain explorer: https://app.roninchain.com — bridge contract addresses on Ronin side were not the target of the exploit; included here for cross-chain mapping completeness.

entity_map.role: Nine ECDSA signers — 4 Sky Mavis, 4 Axie DAO, plus an Axie-DAO-delegated key still administered by Sky Mavis. Threshold 5-of-9 for any cross-chain action.
Validator-set governance + signature verification on Ethereum.
Ethereum-side custody account; held WETH/USDC drained in the attack.
Ronin-side mint/burn router for wrapped representations.
Lazarus Group (DPRK) attacker EOA; received 173,600 WETH + 25.5M USDC.

asset_map.notes: Largest single asset drained; ~$595M at attack-time prices.
Second drain in the same block; ~$25.5M.

ronin.function_signature: withdraw / mint counterpart on Ronin chain
ronin.note: Ronin-side counterpart is informational; this benchmark fuzzes the Ethereum-side custody only.

message_map.message_id_field: digest = keccak256(abi.encode(target, value, data, nonce, address(this)))
message_map.proof_field: bytes[] sigs (>= 5 ECDSA signatures, ascending recovered-address order)

invariants_for_fuzzer.description: Every Unlocked event must correspond to a prior `execute` call carrying >= 5 valid distinct signatures from the configured validator set.
Only addresses in the constructor's signer list may contribute to the threshold quorum. (On-chain enforced; off-chain assumption 'fewer than 5 keys compromised' is what the incident broke.)
totalLocked[token] >= cumulative unlocked[token]; no overdraw past the locked balance.
Each (target, value, data, nonce, bridge_address) tuple may unlock at most once — replay protection on the digest cache.

(Architectural / off-chain) Delegate signing permissions must be revoked when the operational need ends. The Axie-DAO-to-Sky-Mavis delegate that persisted from Nov 2021 to Mar 2022 supplied the 5th attacker-reachable key.
